acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.
testHints: phase-02 source grep confirms no permission request path in startup/session/navigation sources

implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.
testHints: phase-02 source grep confirms no permission request path in startup/session/navigation sources

matchedGroups.title: Startup routing and splash gate
requiredBehaviors: Home start when login state is true.
Onboarding start when login state is false.
Loading gate clears only after start destination is resolved.
riskHints: Source uses blocking Flow read in startup; target should preserve user-visible gating without unnecessary shell coupling.
acceptanceEvidence: focused startup session test pass or compile pass
uiContracts: startup route chosen before normal navigation shell

matchedGroups.title: Session and selection repositories
requiredBehaviors: Repository reads provide ads, food, and restaurants for home UI.
Selected restaurant write must be observable by detail/history/cart flows.
riskHints: Source fake repositories are simple but UI relies on their immediate emission semantics.

matchedGroups.title: Navigation shell and bottom bar rules
requiredBehaviors: Route transitions preserve single-top style semantics where practical.
Bottom bar is not shown on onboarding, login, detail, cart, or profile surfaces.
riskHints: Do not overfit Android Nav APIs; preserve user-visible routing behavior only.
uiContracts: home and history show bottom bar when scroll position is at top
cart action sits above bottom bar

phaseGroupIndex.title: Platform capability: Background work, services, receivers, widgets, and notifications
Platform capability: Runtime permissions and protected platform access

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.

riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
